byok.description: Use your own API keys for AI providers to have more control over costs and usage.

byok.providers.empty.description: Add your own API keys for AI providers to use your own infrastructure.
byok.providers.empty.title: No Providers Configured
byok.providers.form.api_key_help: Your API key is stored locally on this device.
byok.providers.form.base_url_help: Selecting a provider fills its default API Base URL. You can edit it to use a compatible proxy endpoint.
byok.providers.form.model_help: Choose a suggested model or type any model ID supported by your endpoint.
byok.providers.title: Providers
byok.title: Bring Your Own Key (BYOK)
byok_processing.description: Shows BYOK jobs for newly ingested RSS entries, including summary, tags, and quality score.
byok_processing.error.generic_descriptio: Processing failed. This may be caused by a model error or an unstable network. You can retry this entry or dismiss this alert.
byok_processing.error.retry_failed_in_pi: This entry is already in the processing queue.
byok_processing.error.retry_failed_missi: This entry could not be found.
byok_processing.error.retry_failed_nothi: This entry has no remaining processing steps.
byok_processing.error.retry_failed_unsub: This entry belongs to an unsubscribed feed.
byok_processing.error.retry_started: This entry was added back to the processing queue.
byok_processing.error.timeout_descriptio: Processing did not finish within 90 seconds and was skipped. The model may be slow or the network unstable. You can retry this entry or dismiss this alert.
byok_processing.idle_hint: When new feeds arrive, enabled BYOK actions run here with up to 2 parallel jobs.
byok_processing.rescore.confirm: Rescore all eligible entries in the current library? Existing quality scores will be cleared and regenerated with the latest rubric.
byok_processing.rescore.empty: No eligible entries were found in the current library.
byok_processing.rescore.failed: Failed to start quality score rescore.
byok_processing.rescore.hint: Rescore uses the latest rubric and applies to all entries currently loaded in the library, including read items.
byok_processing.rescore.started: Queued {{count}} entries for quality score rescore.
byok_processing.rescore_feeds.confirm: Rescore {{entryCount}} entries from {{feedCount}} selected feed(s)? Existing scores in those feeds will be cleared and regenerated.
byok_processing.rescore_feeds.descriptio: Pick the feeds you want to rescore. Only entries already loaded in the library are included.
byok_processing.rescore_feeds.empty: No eligible entries were found in the selected feeds.
byok_processing.rescore_feeds.failed: Failed to start feed quality score rescore.
byok_processing.rescore_feeds.started: Queued {{count}} entries for quality score rescore.
byok_processing.rescore_feeds.title: Rescore selected feeds
byok_processing.title: BYOK Processing

embedding.description: Use a separate embedding API for personalized recommendations. This is independent from BYOK chat models and can use cheaper embedding endpoints.

embedding.title: Embedding Provider
embedding_processing.description: Shows embedding jobs for unread RSS entries using title, feed summary/description, and content text.
embedding_processing.idle_hint: Embedding runs independently from BYOK with up to 2 parallel jobs.
embedding_processing.rebuild.confirm: Rebuild embeddings for all unread eligible entries? Existing vectors will be cleared and regenerated.
embedding_processing.rebuild.empty: No unread entries with embeddable text were found in the current library.
embedding_processing.rebuild.hint: Backlog counts unread eligible entries not yet queued. Coverage only includes entries currently loaded in the library.
embedding_processing.title: Embedding Processing
